summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cash Piloting Dashboard Phase 2 features. All 37 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all 4 new features: Recurrence Mode (Repeat/Distribute), Flow Status + Carryover, Cash Flow Table (Matrix View), and P&L Panel Enhancement.

console_warnings.issue: Chart width/height warnings (-1) during tab switching - non-blocking

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data with cleanup fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features fully tested and working: 1) Distribute Mode - POST /api/cash-flows/batch with recurrence_mode=distribute creates flows that split total amount across periods (e.g., 36000/6=6000/month). Children inherit distribute mode. 2) Flow Status/Carryover - PUT /api/flow-occurrences sets planned/paid/unpaid status. Unpaid creates carryover in next month. Paid/planned removes carryover. Projection skips unpaid occurrences. 3) Cash Flow Table - Matrix view with Revenues on top, Expenses below, Net P/L row. Month columns. Cell click opens edit dialog. 4) P&L Panel - Shows itemized flows under revenue/cost sections with status buttons. Status cycling (planned->paid->unpaid->planned) works. Entry Log shows 'Dist' badge for distribute mode flows and recurring indicators.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/cash-flows/batch with recurrence_mode=distribute creates correct flow
Backend: GET /api/projection correctly distributes amounts across periods (total/count per period)
Backend: Distribute mode handles rounding correctly on last period
Backend: Linked flows inherit distribute mode and count from parent
Backend: PUT /api/cash-flows/{id} propagates recurrence_mode changes to children
Backend: PUT /api/flow-occurrences sets status for flow occurrence
Backend: PUT /api/flow-occurrences marks flow as unpaid and creates carryover in next month
Backend: PUT /api/flow-occurrences marks flow as paid/planned removes carryover
Backend: GET /api/flow-occurrences returns occurrences filtered by month
Backend: Projection engine skips unpaid occurrences
Backend: Carryover flows appear in projection for the next month
Backend: GET /api/month-details/{month} returns flow_id, status, is_carryover for each flow
Backend: Month details shows is_carryover=True for carryover flows
Backend: Distribute carryover uses per-period amount, not total
Backend: GET /api/flow-occurrences endpoint exists
Backend: PUT /api/flow-occurrences endpoint exists
Frontend: Dashboard loads with all KPI cards
Frontend: Tab switching between Projection and Cash Flow Table works
Frontend: Cash Flow Table shows matrix with Revenues/Expenses/Net P/L sections
Frontend: Cash Flow Table has month columns (13 columns including Flow)
Frontend: Cell edit dialog opens when clicking cells in Cash Flow Table
Frontend: Quick Add form shows Repeat/Distribute toggle when recurrence is set
Frontend: Quick Add shows per-period preview when distribute mode + amount + count entered
Frontend: P&L Panel shows when month is selected
Frontend: P&L Panel shows itemized flows under revenue and cost sections
Frontend: P&L Panel shows status buttons (planned/paid/unpaid) for each flow
Frontend: Clicking status button cycles through planned -> paid -> unpaid -> planned
Frontend: Entry Log shows recurring flow indicators
Frontend: Entry Log shows linked flow badges
Frontend: Entry Log edit dialog includes recurrence mode toggle

distribute_mode.details: Flows with recurrence_mode=distribute split total amount across periods. Children inherit mode. Projection correctly calculates per-period amounts with rounding on last period.

flow_status_carryover.details: Status cycling (planned/paid/unpaid) works via PUT /api/flow-occurrences. Unpaid creates carryover in next month. Paid/planned removes carryover. Projection skips unpaid occurrences.

cash_flow_table.details: Matrix view with Revenues on top, Expenses below, Net P/L row. Month columns. Cell click opens edit dialog. 204 clickable cells found.

pl_panel_enhancement.details: Shows itemized flows under revenue/cost sections with status buttons. 11 status buttons found in test. Status cycling works.
